# FOSHT — Febriansyah S.Kom

> Personal portfolio and digital command center of Febriansyah, a Web Developer & AI Prompt Specialist based in Lampung, Indonesia.

## About
Febriansyah (FOSHT) is a web developer specializing in React, Next.js, and AI-powered applications. Graduate of IIB Darmajaya with GPA 3.71.

## Projects
- Crypto Directory Indonesia: cryptodirectoryindonesia.io
- Oshtore (web dev services): oshtore.vercel.app
- Cyber Web Scanner: cyberwebscanner.onrender.com
- Chat Global: chatglobal.cryptodirectoryindonesia.io
- BlastFlow: blastflow.onrender.com
